original_text: yo can u just fix the bug already its been 3 days lol
formal: Could you please address the bug at your earliest convenience? It has been unresolved for three days.
friendly: Hey! The bug has been open for three days — could you take a look when you have a moment? Thanks!
neutral: The bug has been open for three days. Please fix it when you can.

formal: Could you confirm the planned deployment window?
friendly: Hey, do you know roughly when we can deploy?

formal: The pull request is ready for your review.
friendly: PR is ready whenever you have time to review!
neutral: The PR is ready for review.

formal: The VPN connectivity issue has recurred; please advise.
friendly: Ugh, VPN seems down again — any idea what's going on?

formal: We need to identify the change that impacted production.
friendly: Does anyone know what might have affected prod? No blame, just trying to fix fast.
neutral: We should find what caused the production issue.

formal: I approve; please proceed with the release.
friendly: Looks good to me — ship it!

formal: Please provide the logs from the overnight window.
friendly: Could you grab last night's logs when you get a sec?
neutral: Please share the logs from last night.

formal: The stand-up will begin in five minutes.
